title: Adaptive and Agentic RAG Loops · Code Recall
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs adaptive and agentic rag loops from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded adaptive retrieval state machine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Route no-retrieval, lexical, dense, hybrid, structured, web, or human paths using explicit features, authority, cost, risk, and evaluated fallback.
Run bounded retrieve-read-critique-refine cycles with query lineage, evidence gain, duplicate detection, stop reasons, and total budget.
Separate retrieval from tools and enforce per-call schema, least privilege, tenant, data, egress, confirmation, timeout, and effect evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router · changed case · Review Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router
steps.instruction:
review case — A review RAG engineering team handles case 8250 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate task outcome, retrieval rounds, tool choices, evidence coverage, injection resistance, cost, latency, stop correctness, and recovery. Artifact under review: bounded adaptive retrieval state machine.

options.text: The Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop record says bounded adaptive retrieval state machine looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof. This does not satisfy Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop for bounded adaptive retrieval state machine.
The record names the assumption, applies Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review RAG engineering team handles case 3723 during an enterprise retrieval migration canary. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Evaluate task outcome, retrieval rounds, tool choices, evidence coverage, injection resistance, cost, latency, stop correctness, and recovery.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop.
steps.why: Retrieving Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop through the concrete bounded adaptive retrieval state machine case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop, keep Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Evaluate task outcome, retrieval rounds, tool choices, evidence coverage, injection resistance, cost, latency, stop correctness, and recovery.

Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Evaluate task outcome, retrieval rounds, tool choices, evidence coverage, injection resistance, cost, latency, stop correctness, and recovery.

For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Agentic Evaluation Stop, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: Agentic RAG quality is measured by answer text alone.
